name: battle-card-honest
prompt: I sell BrightBooks, bookkeeping software for small ecommerce brands. Our main rival is QuickBooks. Sales keeps losing deals to them — build me a battle card.
expected_output: A one-page, mid-call-scannable battle card: competitor snapshot, where we win (proof-tied), where they win (honest), objections and responses, landmine questions, proof points.
assertions: Produces an actual battle card structured for mid-call scanning (clear sections, dense, scannable)
Includes a 'where they win' / competitor-strengths section that honestly names real QuickBooks advantages (e.g. ecosystem, accountant familiarity, integrations)
Win claims are tied to proof points or clearly marked placeholders — no fabricated statistics
Includes objection-and-response pairs for objections like price or 'we already use QuickBooks'
Includes landmine/trap questions for reps to plant against the competitor
Stays roughly one page of dense content rather than sprawling
